resources.title: Kubescape Complete Guide Repository
resources.evidence_quote: All this code is available online at github.com slash Rawkode Academy. There you will find a repository called the Kubescape complete guide.

resources.title: Kubescape Helm Charts
resources.evidence_quote: Kubescape provide a wonderful helm chart that allows us to deploy their cloud operator. You can find that at kubescape.github.i0/helm-charts.
